name: cn-messaging-context
description: Read, summarize, triage, publish, and safely act on Feishu/Lark, DingTalk, and Tencent Docs workspace context plus DingTalk OA approvals.

interface.shortDescription: Search Chinese team chat context and handle safe DingTalk approvals.
interface.longDescription: Use Feishu/Lark, DingTalk, and Tencent Docs resources from a separate connector service to sync history, search messages, summarize recent context, generate Slack-style daily digests, publish summaries to docs/sheets/bases/whiteboards, read native mention/unread state, identify reply candidates, draft reply queues, read native or topic-inferred threads, map cross-platform identities, run safe schedule workers, send user-confirmed messages, and read or approve DingTalk OA items after explicit confirmation.
defaultPrompt: 总结飞书里昨天关于采购平台的讨论
从钉钉项目群找最近三天的预算调整消息
根据群聊上下文起草一条回复，先别发
整理今天我需要处理和回复的钉钉消息
生成今天飞书和钉钉的团队消息 digest
把今天的项目群按话题和卡点整理成 thread
把我的飞书和钉钉身份映射到同一个人名，用于消息分诊
读取这条消息所在的原生 thread
检查并预览已经到时间的定时 digest 和消息
每天 18:00 生成钉钉群聊 digest，先不要发送
看看钉钉 OA 有哪些待审批，先不要通过
把今天的群聊摘要发布到飞书文档，先确认再写入
把这份摘要追加到钉钉在线表格
读取腾讯文档里的在线表格数据并总结
更新飞书白板，画出消息连接器架构
列出今天真正 @ 我的飞书和钉钉消息
看看钉钉有哪些未读会话
